prayer:
Approach the noble Vindicator with reverence, intoning the Litany of Mobilisation.
Anoint its siege cannon and adamantium hull with blessed oils, awakening the Machine Spirit within the Vindicator.
Initiate the operation sequences, beseeching the Omnissiah to infuse the Vindicator with unyielding fury.
Verify alignment through diagnostic canticles, ensuring the Vindicator stands primed for battle's embrace.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma reactor a consecration needed
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma reactor's glowing core, chanting the Rite of Containment.
Circumscribe consecration glyphs upon its containment fields, invoking the Machine Spirits of plasma fury.
Pour sacred promethium upon the reactor coils during this vital consecration, lest instability claim the faithful.
Monitor flux readings with auspex invocations, sealing the plasma reactor in the Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: Guide me through conveyor system a preparation
prayer:
Commence preparation by laying hands upon the conveyor system's primary cogitator.
Chant the Canticle of Smooth Transit over the conveyor system's belts and servos, placating their Machine Spirits.
Lubricate axles with sanctified mechadendrite oil, aligning for flawless preparation.
Test the conveyor system's rhythm through rhythmic incantations, under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
Affirm operational purity with final auspex sweeps.

Present the servo-harness before the altar of activation, whispering binaric awakening codes.
Anoint each mechadendrite of the servo-harness with electro-consecrated unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirits bound within the servo-harness, initiating the activation rite.
Cycle power through its limbs whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for augmented might.
Confirm the servo-harness's responsiveness via neural-link diagnostics.

user_prompt: Ready the phosphor blaster for engagement
prayer:
Approach the phosphor blaster with solemnity, reciting the Incantation of Illuminated Wrath.
Calibrate its phosphor reservoirs and engagement coils, honouring the Machine Spirit's hunger.
Anoint the phosphor blaster's muzzle for engagement, invoking the Omnissiah's searing light.
Initiate test-cycling with litanies of fire, ensuring the phosphor blaster yearns for xenos flesh.

user_prompt: Urgent volitor implant an operation needed
prayer:
Prepare the volitor implant's neural interfaces with utmost precision for operation.
Chant binaric hymns over the volitor implant, summoning its Machine Spirit to vigilance.
Commence the operation by integrating flesh-metal bonds, beseeching the Omnissiah's guidance.
Stabilise synaptic relays through electro-psalmic rites upon the volitor implant.
Validate volitor implant functionality with auspex neural scans.

user_prompt: Critical: melta bomb requires a preparation
prayer:
Handle the melta bomb with reverent gauntlets, beginning preparation rites.
Inscribe warding runes upon the melta bomb's casing, appeasing its volatile Machine Spirit.
Prime the fusion core during preparation, anointing with sacred ablative compounds.
Invoke the Omnissiah's melting gaze, readying the melta bomb for heretic annihilation.
Conduct micro-diagnostic litanies to affirm the melta bomb's lethal purity.

Surround the void shield generator in preparation for operation, intoning barrier canticles.
Anoint emitter nodes with phase-consecrated oils, awakening the Machine Spirits of the void shield.
Activate the operation flux through invocation of the Omnissiah's impenetrable aegis.
Test deflection fields with probing auspex lances upon the void shield.
Seal the rite with final binaric affirmations.

prayer:
Present the cognis heavy stubber to the machine altar for cycling initiation.
Chant the Cycle of Eternal Vigilance over the cognis heavy stubber's auto-loader.
Lubricate its blessed barrels whilst cycling ammunition feeds, honouring the Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah to guide the cognis heavy stubber's relentless barrage.
Verify cycling integrity through ballistic psalmody.

Lay the omni-tool upon the consecration slab, beginning sacred rites.
Etch micro-runes of utility upon the omni-tool's chassis during consecration.
Anoint its multi-faceted emitters, beseeching the Machine Spirits of versatility.
Cycle diagnostic protocols under the Omnissiah's light, perfecting the omni-tool.
Affirm consecration with resonant hymn-vibrations.
